caption: A screen recording shows a web browser with multiple open tabs, including "True & Learning by Symmetry!", "Future of Society by Symmetry!", and "Insights >> Introduction & Aims". A video call is active in the top right corner, featuring a man with a blue shirt and black headphones. The main window displays a dark digital workspace with a conceptual diagram. The diagram consists of various nodes connected by lines; one prominent section is circled in red and contains text including "All Visible Assumptions," "reach point," and "start point." A blue and white logo is visible among the nodes. Across the sequence of frames, the screen remains virtually static, with the man in the video call maintaining a consistent position and expression, and the digital diagram remaining unchanged.
